历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for Physics Category was approximately 18452 → 79347 (abnormal gap in 2022) → 19780 → 26392 → 20901. Excluding the 2022 anomaly, the ranking fluctuated between 19780 and 26392 in the past 4 years, with a 2025 baseline of about 20900, recovering by about 5500 from 2024, indicating a rebound in application popularity; provincial Physics Category enrollment plans were 867 in 2021, 853 in 2022, 865 in 2023, 870 in 2024, and 871 in 2025, generally stable with a slight increase; the 2026 plan is 978, an expansion of 107 (+12.3%) compared to 2025, a significant increase that will intensify competition and push the minimum ranking backward.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: A 211 Project and Double First-Class university; in the Soft Science Chinese University Main Ranking, it ranked 42nd from 2021 to 2023, 47th from 2024 to 2025, and 45th in 2026, stable in the 40–50 range, belonging to the upper-middle tier of 211 universities; no negative records were found in the reputation file, with overall reputation stable; Douyin heat total ranking 54th, rated as 'relatively hot', with a comprehensive heat of about 564,000, short video exposure at an upper-middle level, reflecting moderate application attention. No abnormal admission signals were found in historical filing records; in the fifth round of discipline evaluation, Veterinary Medicine A+, Animal Husbandry A+, Crop Science A, Aquaculture A, and Food Science and Engineering A, totaling 5 disciplines at A- or above, with distinctive agricultural and forestry characteristics, providing stable attraction for related majors.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Popular majors such as Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, and Electrical Engineering remain highly sought after, but the university's advantageous disciplines (agriculture and forestry) have generally stable social heat; the total number of college entrance exam takers in the province in 2026 is about 393,700, with an estimated Physics Category of about 252,000 based on recent proportions, slightly increased from 2025 (249,800), expanding the competition base; Huazhong Agricultural University is located in Wuhan, Hubei Province, a provincial university with a large enrollment scale in the province (Physics Category accounts for a significant proportion of the total university plan), and local applicants typically have high willingness to apply, with stable regional preference.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the historical ranking fluctuation trend, the significant expansion of Physics Category in 2026 (+12.3%), and a slight increase in provincial examinees; taking into account the slight rise in Soft Science ranking, Douyin heat being relatively hot, and other competition intensification signals. It is predicted that the minimum ranking for Physics Category in 2026 will be about 22492, with a range of 21992–22992.

The 2026 plan is 112, a decrease of 27 (-19.4%) compared to 2025, a significant reduction that will intensify competition and push the minimum ranking forward.

学校层次与声誉.text: A 211 Project and Double First-Class university; ranked 45th in the 2026 Soft Science China University Main Ranking, a stable position among mid-to-upper tier 211 universities. Its reputation is stable with no negative public opinion. Douyin popularity is 'relatively hot', with moderate to high short video exposure and acceptable application attention. Veterinary Medicine A+, Animal Husbandry A+, Crop Science A, Aquaculture A, and Food Science and Engineering A are all in science, engineering, and agriculture fields, which have limited direct appeal to History Category applicants, but the overall 211 level still strongly attracts liberal arts students.
